description_long: A muscular adult male figure stands with arms slightly outstretched, displaying a highly defined and exaggerated physique. His head is bald except for a single prominent lock of hair at the front, and his facial features are stern with a strong jawline. He wears loose, drawstring athletic pants that gather at the ankles, paired with heavy, high boots. Both forearms are wrapped or armored with metallic-looking bracers, adding a rugged, combat-ready appearance. The skin is smooth and unblemished, with visible muscle definition across the chest, arms, and back. The overall look suggests a character suited for action or urban street scenarios, possibly inspired by video game or comic book aesthetics.
description: A bald, muscular adult male with a single front hair lock, wearing loose athletic pants, heavy boots, and metallic bracers on both forearms.
description_view_0: Front view shows the defined chest, abs, facial features, and the single lock of hair, with arms outstretched and bracers visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the muscular arm, profile of the face, and the bracer's detail, with the pants and boots in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the broad, muscular back, the waistband of the pants, and the back of the boots and bracers.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the muscular build, bracer, and the side of the head and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: loose athletic pants with drawstring, heavy boots, metallic forearm bracers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: bald with a single prominent front lock
